trace_types.name: Log Trace
trace_types.description: A trace recorded in application, system, or audit logs.

trace_types.name: Document Trace
trace_types.description: A trace represented by a document, report, resolution, or formal record.

trace_types.name: Database Trace
trace_types.description: A trace stored as a database entry, transaction record, or structured data update.

trace_types.name: Sensor Trace
trace_types.description: A trace produced by a sensor, device measurement, or environmental signal.

trace_types.name: Physical Trace
trace_types.description: A trace observable in the physical world as a material effect of an action.

trace_types.name: Communication Trace
trace_types.description: A trace generated through messages, notifications, emails, or transmitted signals.

trace_types.name: Regulatory Trace
trace_types.description: A trace produced through compliance actions, legal notices, or regulatory filings.
